Class Poseidon2

java.lang.Object
com.primust.core.Poseidon2
public final class Poseidon2 extends Object
Poseidon2 hash function over BN254 scalar field.

Parameters: t=4, d=5 (S-box x^5), 4+56+4 rounds. Ported from primust_artifact_core (Python reference implementation).

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    Poseidon2.Sponge
    Poseidon2 sponge construction with rate=3, capacity=1, t=4.

    Description
    static List<BigInteger>
    bytesToFieldElements(byte[] data)
    Convert bytes to BN254 field elements (31-byte chunks, big-endian).

    hash(List<BigInteger> inputs)
    Hash a list of field elements using Poseidon2 sponge (fixed-length).
    static BigInteger[]
    permute(BigInteger[] state)
    Full Poseidon2 permutation for BN254, t=4.
    static String
    poseidon2Bytes(byte[] data)
    Poseidon2 hash over arbitrary bytes, matching TS/Python commitment implementations.
